nodes.label: AI as verification tool for own data
nodes.grounding_span: I used the AI as a means to verify my own information and rough math

nodes.label: AI as creative inspiration source
nodes.grounding_span: AI is good at providing the initial inspiration of a direction to take a task in

nodes.label: Conversational back-and-forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to have a more back-and-forth approach similar to having a conversation with an intelligent friend or teacher

nodes.label: AI augmentation of managerial tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I can see AI augmenting a lot of work in that field

nodes.label: Professional validation and credibility
nodes.grounding_span: I finally had my idea validated

nodes.label: Creative autonomy and craft integrity
nodes.grounding_span: I never follow the instructions as they are laid out, rather take the idea and run with it

nodes.label: Efficiency and analytical rigor
nodes.grounding_span: AI to do the heavy lifting of crunching numbers and analyzing or presenting data

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for validating own ideas
nodes.grounding_span: The situation involving the dispute about my garlic knot process felt very satisfying to me

nodes.label: Preference for AI as collaborator not replacement
nodes.grounding_span: I wont be using AI to create new products or replace my expertise, but I can use it as a right hand man

nodes.label: Indifference to colleagues' non-use of AI
nodes.grounding_span: My colleagues do not use it to my knowledge, they are content running the business as it has always been run

nodes.label: Hypothesis-driven experimentation — tests own ideas with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I had a hunch that my process was beneficial to the business and had voiced my feelings regarding the situation but was not prepared to do all the math myself so I used AI to do the heavy lifting

nodes.label: Conversational iterative reasoning — prefers dialogue over one-shot prompts
nodes.grounding_span: The back-and-forth approach allows me to navigate the problem/solution in a more natural way
